generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed in permafrost regions to measure ground thermal state with ±0.1°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance SoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Capacitance-based soil moisture sensor with 1% volumetric water content resolution, operating at 1Hz sampling rate"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralHealthMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Fiber optic distributed sensing system for structural deformation monitoring with 1mm spatial resolution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralDeformationDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalRadiationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Spectrum-analyzing radiation sensor covering UV to IR range with 0.1µSv/h sensitivity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalRadiationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance StructuralDeformationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralHealthMonitor
]

instance EnvironmentalRadiationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalRadiationSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Finite element thermal model simulating permafrost degradation with 1m³ element resolution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinSimulationEngine
]

instance SoilMoistureTransportModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Richard's equation-based model for unsaturated soil moisture dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinSimulationEngine
]

instance StructuralResponseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Finite element structural dynamics model with modal analysis capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinSimulationEngine
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature data from permafrost monitoring network with 5-minute aggregation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingPipeline
]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed soil moisture measurements with 1-hour temporal resolution"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingPipeline
]

instance StructuralDeformationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structural health monitoring data with 1-second sampling rate"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralDeformationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingPipeline
]

instance EnvironmentalRadiationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Spectral radiation measurements with 1-minute temporal resolution"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalRadiationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingPipeline
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DigitalTwinSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance computing engine for real-time digital twin simulations using CUDA acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables PermafrostSimulationService, StructuralAnalysisService
]

instance DataProcessingPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Apache Spark-based distributed processing pipeline for sensor data aggregation and feature extraction"

]

instance DigitalTwinIntegrationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

// C6: Services
instance PermafrostSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time permafrost thermal state predictions with 95% confidence intervals"

]

instance StructuralAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing modal analysis and fatigue life assessment of structural components"

]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance SystemMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

// C17: Insights/Actions

]

instance StructuralFailureRiskInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated structural failure probability with remaining useful life estimation"
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D environmental condition visualization with real-time sensor data overlay"
]

]

    base:desc "Notification system for approved configuration changes with rollback capabilities"

]
